en.subtitle: Hi! I'm jack
en.description:
I currently create websites and games.
While studying computer science at Paris Saclay University.
en.aboutTitle:
Second year French & English speaking bachelor student , freelancing in
website design & video editing and open to work!
en.skillsDescription:
My knowledge in design was gained by working
on diverse small personal projects.
My time in university was spent more on computer architecture, algorithm optimization and compiler theory.
en.service1Description: This was mostly done through classes which used graph theory and binary trees to articulate how algorithms can be optimized by analyzing time complexities and proving the validity of these programs.
en.service2Description: Learned how to write clean, documented code that encapsulates large swaths of data without compromising performance. Object oriented programming layed my foundations on how to properly write code and how to efficiently use different methods such as dynamic dispatching, late binding and of course, polymorphism.
en.service3Description: My knowledge in design was gained by working on diverse small personal projects. My time in university was spent more on computer architecture, algorithm optimization and compiler theory.
en.service4Description: I have been able to dive deeper inside automaton theory, syntax trees and context free grammar thanks to my courses which has given me a better understanding in turn of diverse automata. Overall formal language theory has helped me understanding how lexical analyseurs work and how to create a compiler generator, a skill that has been useful for reinforcing my understanding of language pipelines.

fr.subtitle: Salut! Je suis jack
fr.description:
Je crée actuellement des sites web et des jeux.
Tout en étudiant l'informatique à l'Université Paris Saclay.
fr.aboutTitle: Étudiant en licence bilingue français & anglais deuxième année, freelance en conception de sites web & montage vidéo et disponible pour travailler!
fr.skillsDescription: Mes connaissances en design ont été acquises en travaillant sur des projets personnels. Mon temps à l'université a été davantage consacré à l'architecture informatique, l'optimisation d'algorithmes et la théorie des compilateurs.
